name: Fajitas with Stir-Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 200°F.
2. Cut the chicken breast crosswise into 1/4-inch-thick strips. Place the chicken in a small bowl.
3. Add 6 tablespoons of lemon juice, 2 tablespoons of coriander (if using), cumin, cornstarch, salt, and pepper. Mix gently until the chicken is well coated; set aside.
4. Stack the tortillas and wrap them in foil. Place them in the oven to warm for 5 to 10 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, make the sauce: In a small bowl, stir together the salsa and remaining 2 tablespoons of lemon juice and 2 tablespoons of coriander (if using).
6. Shred the lettuce.
7. In a medium skillet, warm the oil over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and sauté until white and firm, about 5 minutes.
8. Place the tortillas, chicken, shredded lettuce, sauce, and sour cream in serving dishes. Diners can then assemble their own fajitas by topping a tortilla with some of each of the ingredients, ending with a dollop of sour cream, and rolling it up.
